message: validateDiff accepts arbitrary relative pathspec operands even though the contract only permits optional commit-ish arguments for git diff.
evidence: The contract requires diff to accept exactly one of --name-only/--name-status plus at most two non-flag commit-ish arguments, and records that arbitrary file path arguments are not needed. validateDiff only calls checkPathArg for non-flag operands and then increments nonFlagCount, while checkPathArg rejects absolute paths, traversal, and leading ':' magic but allows ordinary relative paths such as go.mod.

message: The migrated reviewLoopGitHead path has no app-level test for a real git repository HEAD success case, including the contract-required trimming behavior.
evidence: reviewLoopGitHead now calls gitctx.Run for rev-parse --verify HEAD and trims output, but rg finds rev-parse/HEAD tests only in internal/gitctx/gitctx_test.go; internal/app/review_loop_test.go only asserts non-empty fingerprints and does not cover this helper against a real git repo.
